welcome:
🎨 Hello, {name}! Welcome to the our shop

I am the artist's assistant bot. Here you can easily:
✨ Check prices and styles
📝 Create a request for your perfect art
⏳ Track your place in the queue

Choose an action from the menu below 👇
socials_text:
I'll be glad to see you on my social networks! Subscribe to not miss new artworks 🎨

📌 Telegram: @ArtChannel
📌 Instagram: @ArtistGram
help_text:
Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) 💡

1. How to order?
Click the Menu button next to the chat, fill out the form and submit. The artist will review the details.

2. How to pay?
We work on 100% prepayment. When your turn comes, the bot will send the payment details. Work begins only after you send a screenshot of the receipt.

3. How does the queue work?
To maintain quality, only 3 arts are drawn at a time. If there are no slots, your order will be waitlisted. The bot will notify you when it's your turn!

4. What is the turnaround time?
On average, 3 to 7 days from payment, depending on the complexity.

5. Are revisions allowed?
Yes! Revisions during the sketch phase are free. Major changes after coloring are discussed individually.
donate_text:
Thank you for supporting my art 💖

You can send any amount via Telegram Stars (⭐️). Choose a comfortable option:
enter_amount: Enter the desired amount in Telegram Stars (from 1 to 10000):
no_orders: You don't have any orders in your history yet
msg_order_sent: ✅ Your request has been sent! The artist will review it soon
msg_nsfw: 🔞 Request rejected by automatic safety system
order_queued:
📝 **Order added to queue**
We will contact you for payment when a slot opens up
order_accepted:
✅ **Order approved**
The artist is ready to start working on it
To pay: **{price} UAH**
💳 Payment details: `1234 5678 9000 0000`

⚠️ **Be sure to include your ID in the payment comment:** `{orderId}`

After the transfer, attach a screenshot of the receipt by pressing the button below
queue_reached:
🎉 **Your turn has arrived**
The artist is ready to start
Amount: **{price} UAH**
💳 Details: `1234 5678 9000 0000`

Please transfer the payment and attach a screenshot of the receipt by clicking the button below. Work will not start without a receipt
order_declined: 😔 Unfortunately, the artist declined your order. Please try again later
payment_confirmed:
✅ **Payment confirmed**
The artist has already received the notification and will soon write to you in direct messages to discuss details, revisions, and the sketch
payment_rejected: ❌ **Payment rejected.** The receipt is invalid. Please send it again
ask_receipt: 📸 Please send a screenshot of your payment receipt (photo):
receipt_sent: ✅ Screenshot sent to the artist for review
art_ready:
🎉 Your art is ready
Please rate the work and leave a tip if you like it ⭐️
thanks_tip: 💖 Thank you so much for the tip ({amount} ⭐️)! The artist really appreciates your support
thanks_donate: 💖 Thank you so much for donating ({amount} ⭐️)! This is very inspiring
web_subtitle: Fill out this form, and I will show you the price immediately
web_desc_ph: Example: I want cyberpunk style art...
web_error: System error. Please try again later
review_subtitle:
Did you like the result?
Rate the artist's work
review_tip_title: Leave a tip for the artist
review_cancel: Payment cancelled. Review not sent yet
privacy_subtitle: Data usage and security of the Telegram Web App
privacy_p1: Welcome to the Telegram bot for ordering art. We respect your personal data and are committed to protecting your privacy.
privacy_l1_1: Basic Telegram profile data: Your Telegram ID, username, first and last name. This info is provided by the messenger itself.
privacy_l1_2: Order information: Order details (format, color), description, and any links you provide.
privacy_l1_3: Media files: Images (references) you upload through the form.
privacy_p2: We use the collected information exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy_l2_1: Order processing: To contact you, clarify details, and fulfill your request by the artist.
privacy_l2_2: Security: All uploaded images are automatically checked by an AI (Sightengine API) for prohibited content (18+). Images failing the check are instantly rejected.
privacy_p3: We guarantee that your personal data, order ideas, and uploaded references:
privacy_l3_1: Are not shared, sold, or rented to third parties or advertising networks.
privacy_l3_2: Are used only by the administrator (artist) to fulfill the specific order.
privacy_l3_3: Are stored in a secure MongoDB database with strictly limited access.
privacy_p4: You can ask us to delete your order history from our database at any time by contacting the artist directly in direct messages.
privacy_p5: By using our bot and submitting the order form, you automatically agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy.
